spec.objective: Finalize the dogfood Project manifest (examples/projects/dogfood/02-codex-runtime-project.yaml) with complete per-level credential and image wiring: planner levels pin the Claude image and tide-secrets; the task level pins ghcr.io/jsquirrelz/tide-codex-subagent plus the new LevelConfig.ProviderSecretRef field pointing to openai-secrets. Confirm the manifest is schema-valid against the v1alpha1 CRD. Update the dogfood README.md with the two-Secret creation steps (tide-secrets carrying ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, openai-secrets carrying OPENAI_API_KEY) and the operator sequencing note.
